sites.name: Loch Ness Centre, Drumnadrochit
sites.description: State-of-the-art visitor center with exhibitions on science, folklore, and investigations
sites.visitor_info: Open daily, advance booking recommended, parking available

sites.name: Urquhart Castle
sites.description: Historic castle ruins with panoramic loch views and visitor center
sites.visitor_info: HES property, admission charges apply, cafe on-site

sites.name: Loch Ness Shores
sites.description: Popular viewing point with beach access and Dores Inn
sites.visitor_info: Free access, pub food available, parking limited
